BaseField.Name: UsageLabel
BaseField.Text: What is the highest degree or level of school you have completed?

BaseField.Name: Label12
BaseField.Text: How satisfied are you with our services in this areas?

BaseField.Name: Label21
BaseField.Text: How likely are you to recommend this product to others?

FormScriptItem.Name: IsFormValid
FormScriptItem.Script:
var formValid = VV.Form.Template.IsFormValid();
VV.Form.SetFieldValue('IsFormValid', formValid , true);

FormScriptItem.Name: FormValidation
Phone_onBlur
page2NextBtn_onClick
BirthDate_onBlur
